description_long: This object visually resembles a roughly assembled rifle-like form constructed from a variety of urban materials, including concrete blocks, bricks, and stones. The main body is composed of rectangular concrete and stone segments, with a vertical brick element suggesting a stock or grip. A flat, tan surface at the base may represent a makeshift platform or support. Several rounded stones and a couple of green plant leaves are present on one side, adding a natural touch to the otherwise industrial composition. The overall structure is blocky and abstract, lacking the refined contours and details of a functional firearm. There are no visible mechanical or metallic components typically associated with rifles, such as a trigger, barrel, or magazine.
description: A blocky, abstract rifle-like object made from concrete, brick, and stone, with some plant elements and a tan base. The form is rough and lacks detailed firearm features.
description_view_0: The front view shows the arrangement of concrete blocks, a vertical brick, and several rounded stones with green leaves on the left side.
description_view_1: From this side, the large concrete block and vertical brick dominate, with the tan base extending forward and fewer visible stones.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the long concrete block and vertical brick, with minimal detail and no visible stones or leaves.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the layered arrangement of blocks, the vertical brick, and the cluster of stones and leaves on the right.
